entries.name: Cold Patch
entries.description: The air turns cold despite the tropics. Breath fogs briefly.

entries.name: Still Water
entries.description: The water goes mirror-flat around old wreckage.

entries.name: Drifting Mist
entries.description: Mist forms around broken timbers and half-sunk hulls.

entries.name: Soft Rain
entries.description: Rain falls without wind. Sounds feel muffled.

entries.name: Distant Bell
entries.description: A bell is heard across the water, though no visible ship carries it.

entries.name: Corpse Lights
entries.description: Pale lights flicker over the sea at night.

entries.name: Whispering Wind
entries.description: The wind passes through rigging like voices.

entries.name: Dead Ship Weather
entries.description: The sky darkens over a wreck. Compasses twitch and crew refuse to look at it.
